'''âm-p-s''' ('''kamapas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coevolve|coevolve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coevolve|coevolve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-p-s
|-
! Lemma
| kamapas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimapas|thimapas]] || [[word:jimapas|jimapas]] || [[word:shimapas|shimapas]] || [[word:kimapas|kimapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumapas|thuthumapas]] || [[word:jujumapas|jujumapas]] || [[word:shushumapas|shushumapas]] || [[word:kukumapas|kukumapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumapas|thumapas]] || [[word:jumapas|jumapas]] || [[word:shumapas|shumapas]] || [[word:kumapas|kumapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumapas|thumapas]] || [[word:jumapas|jumapas]] || [[word:shumapas|shumapas]] || [[word:kumapas|kumapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themapas|themapas]] || [[word:jemapas|jemapas]] || [[word:shemapas|shemapas]] || [[word:kemapas|kemapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomapas|thothomapas]] || [[word:jojomapas|jojomapas]] || [[word:shoshomapas|shoshomapas]] || [[word:kokomapas|kokomapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomapas|thomapas]] || [[word:jomapas|jomapas]] || [[word:shomapas|shomapas]] || [[word:komapas|komapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomapas|thomapas]] || [[word:jomapas|jomapas]] || [[word:shomapas|shomapas]] || [[word:komapas|komapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚmapas|thĂŚmapas]] || [[word:jĂŚmapas|jĂŚmapas]] || [[word:shĂŚmapas|shĂŚmapas]] || [[word:kĂŚmapas|kĂŚmapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamapas|thathamapas]] || [[word:jajamapas|jajamapas]] || [[word:shashamapas|shashamapas]] || [[word:kakamapas|kakamapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamapas|thamapas]] || [[word:jamapas|jamapas]] || [[word:shamapas|shamapas]] || [[word:kamapas|kamapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamapas|thamapas]] || [[word:jamapas|jamapas]] || [[word:shamapas|shamapas]] || [[word:kamapas|kamapas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamapas|shamapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamapas|goshamapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamapas|gokishamapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamapasnĂź|shamapasnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamapasnknĂź|goshamapasnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapasnĂź|gokishamapasnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamapashĂŤ|shamapashĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamapasnkshĂŤ|goshamapasnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamapashĂŤ|gokishamapashĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapasro|shamapasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapasnkro|goshamapasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapasro|gokishamapasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapasmu|shamapasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapasnkmu|goshamapasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapasmu|gokishamapasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamapasher|shamapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamapasnksher|goshamapasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamapasher|gokishamapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamapasng|shamapasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamapasnkng|goshamapasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamapasng|gokishamapasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamapasya|shamapasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamapasnkya|goshamapasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamapasya|gokishamapasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamapasyam|shamapasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamapasnkyam|goshamapasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamapasyam|gokishamapasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamapasnĂźshĂŤ|shamapasnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamapasnknĂźshĂŤ|goshamapasnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamapasnĂźshĂŤ|gokishamapasnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapasnĂźro|shamapasnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapasnknĂźro|goshamapasnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapasnĂźro|gokishamapasnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapasnĂźmu|shamapasnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapasnknĂźmu|goshamapasnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapasnĂźmu|gokishamapasnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamapashĂŤnĂź|shamapashĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamapasnkshĂŤnĂź|goshamapasnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapashĂŤnĂź|gokishamapashĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapashĂŤro|shamapashĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapasnkshĂŤro|goshamapasnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapashĂŤro|gokishamapashĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapashĂŤmu|shamapashĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapasnkshĂŤmu|goshamapasnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapashĂŤmu|gokishamapashĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamapasronĂź|shamapasronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamapasnkronĂź|goshamapasnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapasronĂź|gokishamapasronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamapasroshĂŤ|shamapasroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamapasnkroshĂŤ|goshamapasnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamapasroshĂŤ|gokishamapasroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamapasromu|shamapasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamapasnkromu|goshamapasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamapasromu|gokishamapasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamapasmunĂź|shamapasmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamapasnkmunĂź|goshamapasnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamapasmunĂź|gokishamapasmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamapasmushĂŤ|shamapasmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamapasnkmushĂŤ|goshamapasnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamapasmushĂŤ|gokishamapasmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamapasmuro|shamapasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamapasnkmuro|goshamapasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamapasmuro|gokishamapasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
